summary: RETEST v2 fixes — all 3 fixes VERIFIED on frontend (backend not retested; iteration_2 was 33/33). (1) OTP flow now completes end-to-end: /→tap Table 5→ /otp?table_id=…&restaurant_id=…→phone 9876543212→Send WhatsApp OTP→OTP field appears→123456→Verify & Continue→lands on /menu. No '[object Object]' seen. (2) src/api.ts now correctly stringifies FastAPI 422 detail arrays via `parsed.detail.map(d=>d.msg||JSON.stringify(d)).join('; ')`. (3) testIDs added: admin-phone-input/admin-pin-input work (8888888888/1234 → /admin/queue), sa-phone-input/sa-password-input work (9999999999/super123 → /super-admin/restaurants). E2E sweep verified: Admin queue shows 'STAFF CALL' banner + Table 5 open session; /admin/subscription renders status card ('3 Month · ACTIVE, 89 days remaining' — 3 Month is DB residue from prior tests as documented in iter_2, NOT a regression), 3 available plan cards, tapping 6 Month plan reveals QR + UPLOAD SCREENSHOT + UTR field + SUBMIT area; /admin/promos lists 3 templates (Happy Hour, Weekend Special, Ramzan Iftar) + history; picking a template opens 'FILL IN VARIABLES' form with variable inputs (discount_percent…); /admin/staff-calls shows 1 open call (WATER · Table 1 with 'extra glass' note) + DONE button; /super-admin/restaurants shows Latur Tahari House with SUBBED badge, 3 orders, ₹1300 revenue, RESET PIN button; /super-admin/plans shows 4 plans (3 seed + 1 TEST leftover) with QR thumbnails + EDIT (opens 'Edit Plan' modal with SAVE + auto-QR hint) + HIDE/SHOW toggles; /super-admin/subscriptions PENDING·1 shows the admin-created pending request, tapping APPROVE succeeded → PENDING·0 and the request now appears under ALL·4 with ACTIVE badge. Backend regression suite untouched.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings on every screen: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' Non-blocking on web preview but should migrate for RN new architecture / Web parity. Reference: /app/frontend/src/theme.ts (shadow.card).

action_items: (Optional cosmetic) Migrate `shadow.card` in src/theme.ts from shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius to `boxShadow` string to silence deprecation warnings on Expo web. RN mobile still accepts old props so mobile build is unaffected.

(Optional cosmetic) The Latur Tahari House seeded subscription is currently '3 Month · ACTIVE' rather than the '1 Month · ACTIVE' the review request expected. This is DB residue from prior iteration tests (activate_subscription() was called on longer plans); code is correct. If a clean-slate seed is desired for demos, wipe subscriptions on boot when env FLAG_RESEED=1 is set.
(Nice-to-have) After super-admin approves a subscription, the ALL tab shows the approved item with badge 'ACTIVE' but no confirmation toast is shown to the user. Minor UX polish.
critical_code_review_comments: otp.tsx L43 fix is correct — restaurant_id is destructured from useLocalSearchParams and passed in the body; verify-otp on L63 also passes it. Round-trip complete.
api.ts L21-36 error handler now safely handles: FastAPI 422 array, plain string detail, unknown-shape detail (JSON.stringify fallback), and preserves err.status. Clean.
admin/login.tsx and super-admin/login.tsx both have proper testID coverage on inputs and buttons.
src/api.ts L3 still falls back to '' when EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is missing — would silently break; consider throwing at boot (carried from iter_2).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the 3 targeted fixes + all critical E2E screens loaded and interactive

seed_data_creation: None. Approved 1 pending subscription that admin UI created in iter_2 (its status is now ACTIVE in super-admin ALL tab). No destructive changes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite /app/backend/tests/test_latur_backend.py (33/33 in iter_2) untouched. All 3 v2 frontend fixes verified working. Remaining minor items: (a) Latur seeded active plan is '3 Month' not '1 Month' (DB residue, not code); (b) shadow* deprecation warnings on Expo web; (c) no confirmation toast after super-admin APPROVE (functional but silent). Deep customer sub-flows past /menu (item detail → cart → send-to-kitchen → tracking → CALL STAFF reason submit → confirmation → request bill → admin clean-table modal preview) were NOT re-exercised via UI in this iteration — they were fully covered by backend suite + would need a full customer session run again — but the customer OTP-to-menu path (previously blocked) is now unblocked so main agent can self-verify with confidence. Same for admin promos BROADCAST success toast (template & variable form rendered; broadcast API is passing at backend level per iter_2).
rca_of_issue: N/A — this iteration verified the fixes from iter_2. All previously reported bugs (otp restaurant_id 422, [object Object] error, missing login testIDs) are resolved.
